name: SOCO Dental Studio
tagline: A legacy of trust in Sonoma County dentistry.
seoDescription: SOCO Dental Studio in Santa Rosa offers cosmetic, restorative, and preventive dentistry. Dr. Leslie Jue has cared for Sonoma County smiles since 1987.

images.heroAlt: The SOCO Dental Studio team in Santa Rosa

sections.heading: Three generations of dentists, one Santa Rosa practice
sections.subheading: SOCO Dental Studio brings Dr. Leslie Jue's decades of cosmetic and family care together with Drs. Louie and Baird at 55 Mission Circle.

sections.heading: Built on a legacy of trust
body: SOCO Dental Studio was formed when Dr. Michael Louie merged two long-established Santa Rosa practices into one home for multi-generational families across Sonoma County — three generations of dental experience under one roof.

Dr. Leslie Jue has delivered outstanding care since 1987. A UC Davis physiology graduate and University of the Pacific, Arthur A. Dugoni School of Dentistry alumna, she is a member of the American Academy of Cosmetic Dentistry and a longtime fixture of the local dental community.
highlights: University of the Pacific, Dugoni School trained
American Academy of Cosmetic Dentistry member

sections.heading: Comprehensive care for the whole family
sections.intro: From a routine cleaning to a full smile makeover, every visit is handled in one trusted place.

items.title: Cosmetic Dentistry
items.description: Veneers, bonding, whitening, and full smile makeovers tailored to each patient.

items.title: Invisalign
items.description: Clear, removable aligners that straighten teeth without traditional metal braces.

items.title: Restorative Care
items.description: Crowns, fillings, root canal therapy, and full-mouth rehabilitation to restore function.

items.title: Dental Implants
items.description: Permanent, natural-looking replacements for missing or failing teeth.

items.title: Preventive & Hygiene
items.description: Cleanings, exams, sealants, and periodontal care to keep smiles healthy long term.

items.title: Emergency Dentistry
items.description: Prompt care for dental pain, breaks, and other urgent situations.

images.alt: Treatment room at SOCO Dental Studio

sections.heading: Ready for a dentist your whole family can trust?
sections.body: New patients are always welcome at 55 Mission Circle. Call us or book online — we'll take it from there.

sections.heading: Dentistry done with care, in one place
sections.subheading: Cosmetic, restorative, and preventive care for every generation of your family.

items.title: Cosmetic Dentistry
items.description: Veneers, bonding, professional whitening, and full smile makeovers — designed around your face, not a template. Dr. Jue is a member of the American Academy of Cosmetic Dentistry.

items.title: Invisalign
items.description: Clear, removable aligners that straighten teeth discreetly. A modern alternative to metal braces for teens and adults alike.

items.title: Restorative Care
items.description: Crowns, fillings, root canal therapy, and full-mouth rehabilitation to bring comfort and function back to your smile.

items.title: Dental Implants
items.description: Permanent, natural-looking replacements for missing or failing teeth that look and feel like your own.

items.title: Preventive & Hygiene
items.description: Routine cleanings, exams, sealants, and periodontal care to keep your whole family healthy for the long term.

items.title: Emergency Dentistry
items.description: Same-day attention for dental pain, breaks, and urgent situations — because problems don't keep office hours.

items.a: Yes — new patients of every age are welcome at our 55 Mission Circle office. Call (707) 537-1904 to schedule.
We're at 55 Mission Circle in Santa Rosa, serving Santa Rosa, Windsor, and Healdsburg.
We're open Monday through Thursday, 8:00am–5:00pm. We're closed Friday through Sunday.

items.q: Do you offer cosmetic and Invisalign treatment?
items.a: We do. Dr. Jue is a member of the American Academy of Cosmetic Dentistry, and we offer Invisalign clear aligners alongside our full range of care.

sections.heading: Let's talk about your smile
sections.body: Whether it's a cleaning or a full makeover, we'll build a plan that fits your family.

sections.heading: A Santa Rosa practice, three generations deep
sections.subheading: One home for the families of Sonoma County, built by merging two long-established practices.

sections.heading: Dr. Leslie Jue & the SOCO team
body: SOCO Dental Studio was formed when Dr. Michael Louie merged two long-established Santa Rosa practices into a single home for multi-generational families — bringing three generations of dental experience together under one roof.

Dr. Leslie Jue has delivered outstanding dental care since 1987. A UC Davis physiology graduate and University of the Pacific, Arthur A. Dugoni School of Dentistry alumna, she is a member of the American Academy of Cosmetic Dentistry and a longtime fixture of the local dental community. Alongside Drs. Louie and Baird, she continues to care for the families she's known for decades.
highlights: Dr. Leslie Jue caring for smiles since 1987
University of the Pacific, Dugoni School of Dentistry
American Academy of Cosmetic Dentistry member

sections.heading: Book your visit
sections.blurb: New patients are always welcome. Call us, or send a note and we'll get right back to you.
